description.value:
Frequency once per day

You spew bile in a broad spray, violently vomiting in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30]. Your bile deals @Damage[(ceil(@actor.level/2)-2)d6[acid],(ceil(@actor.level/2)-2)d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in the area, with a basic Reflex save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC. On a failure, a creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Sickened]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). At 11th level and every two levels thereafter, the acid damage and the poison damage each increase by 1d6.
